zh.title: 雪崩币/美元技术分析：短期偏弱震荡整理
zh.content:
目前AVAX/USD价格在6.61附近窄幅波动，较20日均线6.672略低，显示短期空头略占优势，但跌幅有限，市场处于弱势整理阶段。24小时内价格微跌0.12%，多空力量暂时均衡，短线趋势偏弱。  

MACD当前为-0.028，虽处于零轴下方，但尚未形成明确死叉，显示下行动能存在但不强，价格可能在6.61-6.67区间反复震荡。由于RSI数据缺失，无法直接判断超买超卖状态，但结合均线和价格走势，整体市场偏中性偏弱。  

支撑位方面，近期低点6.611可作为短期支撑，跌破可能触发进一步下探；阻力位在20日均线6.672附近，如价格突破可吸引多头介入，形成反弹动力。成交量若配合突破，可确认短线趋势转向。  

交易策略上，建议谨慎操作，短线可在支撑附近逢低做多，止损设置在6.60下方；若价格回升突破均线，可考虑短线跟进，但避免追高。总体来看，AVAX/USD短期偏弱震荡，适合低吸高抛，保持资金灵活性。

en.title: Avalanche vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
AVAX/USD is trading at 6.6174, remaining under mild bearish pressure after a modest 24-hour decline of 0.12%. Price action is currently positioned below the 20-period simple moving average at 6.6723, suggesting that short-term momentum continues to favor sellers. The narrow daily range between 6.6114 and 6.6551 reflects a period of consolidation, with market participants showing limited conviction and waiting for a stronger directional catalyst.

The moving average structure indicates that recent rallies have struggled to gain traction. With price remaining beneath the SMA(20), the near-term trend remains slightly negative unless buyers can reclaim and sustain trading above the 6.67 area. MACD stands at -0.0282, which points to lingering bearish momentum. Although the signal line is unavailable, the negative MACD reading suggests downside pressure remains present, even if momentum appears relatively subdued rather than aggressively bearish.

From a technical perspective, immediate support is located near the session low of 6.6114. A decisive break below this level could expose the market to further weakness toward the psychological 6.50 region. On the upside, initial resistance appears around 6.6550, followed by the SMA(20) near 6.6723. A successful move above these barriers would improve sentiment and could encourage a recovery toward the 6.75–6.80 zone.

Traders may consider maintaining a cautious stance while price remains below the 20-period average. Conservative participants may prefer waiting for a confirmed breakout above 6.67 before considering bullish positions. Conversely, short-term bearish strategies could remain favorable on failed rallies into resistance, provided risk is managed carefully. Given the compressed trading range and muted momentum signals, disciplined stop-loss placement and patience are essential until a clearer trend emerges.
